requirement_topic.en: TBS Import Conformity and PVoC Scope
requirement_topic.zh: TBS 进口符合性与 PVoC 适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: TBS 進口符合性與 PVoC 適用範圍

summary.en: TBS states that PVoC verifies goods to be imported into Tanzania against applicable national standards before shipment, and that consignments subject to PVoC must obtain mandatory customs-clearance documents and a Certificate of Conformity before shipping. EV chargers should therefore be checked by HS code, model, power rating, charger type, and shipment route against TBS regulated-goods and destination-inspection lists rather than assuming all EVSE has one identical product-certificate route.
summary.zh: TBS 说明，PVoC 是在装运前核验拟进口至坦桑尼亚的货物是否符合适用国家标准的程序；受 PVoC 管制的货物在发往坦桑尼亚前必须取得强制清关文件和符合性证书。因此，电动汽车充电桩应按 HS 编码、型号、功率、充电类型和运输路径核对 TBS 管制货物及到港检验清单，而不应假定所有 EVSE 都适用同一种整机产品证书路径。
summary.zht: TBS 說明，PVoC 是在裝運前核驗擬進口至坦尚尼亞的貨物是否符合適用國家標準的程序；受 PVoC 管制的貨物在發往坦尚尼亞前必須取得強制清關文件和符合性證書。因此，電動汽車充電樁應按 HS 編碼、型號、功率、充電類型和運輸路徑核對 TBS 管制貨物及到港檢驗清單，而不應假定所有 EVSE 都適用同一種整機產品證書路徑。

standards_or_laws: Tanzania Standards Act No. 2 of 2009 section 4(1)(s)
TBS Destination Inspection for regulated goods without CoC

summary.en: China factory test reports, CCC-adjacent electrical safety files, and GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 evidence may support conformity review, but they do not replace TBS PVoC, CoC, destination inspection, or Tanzania customs-clearance requirements where the consignment is regulated.
summary.zh: 中国工厂检测报告、与 CCC 相关的电气安全资料以及 GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 证据可支持符合性评审，但在货物受管制时不能替代 TBS PVoC、CoC、到港检验或坦桑尼亚清关要求。
summary.zht: 中國工廠檢測報告、與 CCC 相關的電氣安全資料以及 GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 證據可支持符合性評審，但在貨物受管制時不能替代 TBS PVoC、CoC、到港檢驗或坦尚尼亞清關要求。

gap.en: Confirm the HS code and regulated-goods status before shipment, appoint the relevant PVoC service provider if required, and align the test-report package to the Tanzania standard or accepted IEC basis requested by the conformity assessor.
gap.zh: 出货前应确认 HS 编码和受管制货物状态；如适用，应指定相应 PVoC 服务机构，并将检测报告资料包对应至符合性评估机构要求的坦桑尼亚标准或可接受 IEC 基础。
gap.zht: 出貨前應確認 HS 編碼和受管制貨物狀態；如適用，應指定相應 PVoC 服務機構，並將檢測報告資料包對應至符合性評估機構要求的坦尚尼亞標準或可接受 IEC 基礎。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the exact consignment is subject to TBS PVoC or destination inspection; scope must be verified by HS code and current TBS lists
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T evidence may support review but does not replace Tanzania import conformity or customs-clearance documents

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat TBS import conformity as a shipment gate. Verify PVoC or destination-inspection scope before the goods leave China.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 TBS 进口符合性视为出货关口。货物离开中国前，应核实 PVoC 或到港检验适用范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 TBS 進口符合性視為出貨關口。貨物離開中國前，應核驗 PVoC 或到港檢驗適用範圍。
